flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at MIAT College of Technology rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.5k → $17.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at MIAT College of Technology rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.5k → $17.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at MIAT College of Technology fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (66.7% → 58.5%).

flags.label: For-profit certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at MIAT College of Technology are 175% above the for-profit certificate-predominant peer median ($62.6k vs $22.8k).
